name: Crockpot Macaroni and Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a skillet over medium heat until browned.
2. Drain any excess fat from the meat.
3. Place the meat in the crockpot.
4. Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until it is just tender, then drain well. (For best results, cook slightly less than the time specified on the package).
5. Add the chopped onion, mushroom pieces, corn, tomato soup, salt, and pepper to the crockpot.
6. Stir to combine all ingredients evenly.
7. Cook on low for 7-9 hours or on high for 3-4 hours until the beef is tender and flavors are well combined.
